overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a long coat and red hair exploring a rocky coastal canyon. The character walks through a stone archway to reveal a dramatic ocean vista, continues along a grassy cliff edge, then turns inland through rocky terrain toward a small thatched hut. High-quality game engine rendering with dynamic natural lighting transitioning from shadowed canyons to bright coastal exposure.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shadowed rocky canyon toward the distant stone archway

entered.detail: tall vertical rock face forming the canyon wall
tall vertical rock face forming the canyon wall
natural rock archway cutting through the cliff ahead
loose rocks and stones scattered across the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon with steep cliff walls on both sides. The path is uneven dirt and gravel with sparse vegetation. The lighting is diffused and shadowed within the canyon, with a stone archway visible ahead marking the path forward.

events.description: character passes through the stone archway from enclosed canyon to open coastal cliff
emerging from canyon shadow into bright direct sunlight as ocean comes into view

agents.ego_description: passing through the stone arch and emerging onto the sunlit coastal cliff overlooking the ocean

entered.detail: expansive ocean vista with waves and distant horizon
tall rock formations rising from the ocean water
tall wild grasses lining the cliff edge path

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stone archway, the scene opens dramatically to reveal a stunning coastal vista with crashing waves and sea stacks. The lighting shifts from shadowed canyon to bright sunlight. Tall grass lines the path as the character approaches the cliff edge with panoramic ocean views.

events.description: character turns right away from the cliff edge to head inland

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge enjoying the ocean view, then turning inland away from the coast

entered.detail: weathered wooden box sitting in the grass near the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the grassy cliff edge with expansive ocean views to the left. A wooden crate sits near the path. After reaching a viewpoint, the character turns right to head back into the rocky terrain, leaving the open coast behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon path to coastal hut

events.description: thatched hut comes into view at the end of the rocky path

agents.ego_description: walking through the shadowed rocky canyon toward the small thatched hut by the water

entered.detail: small round hut with conical thatched roof situated near tidal pools
rocky overhang forming a partial roof over the path
shallow pools of water on the rocky ground

segments.scene_description: Moving inland through a narrower rocky passage, the character approaches a small thatched-roof hut situated near tidal pools. The environment becomes more enclosed with rocky walls and stone overhangs, creating a sheltered atmosphere distinct from the open coast. The path leads directly to the rustic hut by the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a shadowed rocky canyon into a bright coastal expanse before retreating toward a sheltered inland cove. It begins by trailing the character through a narrow passage of steep cliff walls and uneven gravel, moving toward a distant stone archway under diffused light. As the character passes through the arch, the scene opens dramatically into brilliant sunlight, revealing a panoramic vista of crashing waves and sea stacks lined with tall grass. The camera then follows the character along the grassy cliff edge past a wooden crate before turning away from the open ocean and heading back into the rocky terrain. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as the path winds through stone overhangs and tidal pools, leading directly to a small thatched-roof hut by the water's edge.
